summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: composition of two 2D rotations about different centers. BLUE initial triangle + always_redraw current (GREEN→ORANGE→RED) via 2-stage t_tr. Stage 1 rotates about C_1 by α=π/3; stage 2 rotates about C_2 by β=π/2. RED C_3 fixed-point found by iteration shows composite is single rotation by α+β.
